verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They say that heavens pretty, and living here is too. But if they said that I would have to choose between the two. I'd go home, going home, where I belong.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And sometimes when I'm dreaming, it comes as no surprise. That if you look and see the homesick feeling in my eyes. I'm going home, going home, where I belong.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But while I'm here I'll serve him gladly, and sing him all my songs. I'm here, but not for long.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I'm feeling lonely, When I'm feeling blue. It's such a joy to know that I am only passing through. I'm headed home, going home, where I belong.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: One day I'll be sleeping, when death knocks on my door. And I'll awake and find that I'm not homesick anymore. I'll be home, going home, where I belong.
